error.network: Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.
error.server: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

collectionSettings.title: Collection settings
collectionSettings.sectionPreviewHint: Applies to everyone with access to this collection.
collectionSettings.previewPopupToggleDesc: Show an enlarged preview when hovering over a bookmark in list view.
collectionSettings.exportDescription: Download all bookmarks and folders in this collection as a Netscape HTML file.
collectionSettings.sectionLayoutHint: How bookmarks are arranged in this collection. Each collection remembers its own choice.
collectionSettings.sectionPropertiesHint: Where defined properties appear in the UI. Persisted on this device.
collectionSettings.localPersistedHint: These preferences are saved locally on this device.

property.badgesToggleDesc: Render property values inline below each bookmark's tags
property.sidebarToggleDesc: List defined properties in the left sidebar for quick filtering
property.manageSectionHint: Use property:name=value in search to filter, or click a badge on any card.
property.manageSectionHintWithSyntax: Custom fields available on every bookmark in this collection. Use {syntax} in search to filter, or click a badge on any card.
property.noDefinitions: No properties yet — add one below.
property.noDefinitionsInline: No properties defined yet — open Collection settings to add some.
property.errorNameFormat: Use only letters, digits, underscore or hyphen — no spaces.
property.deleteConfirm: Delete the property "{name}"? Any values set for this property on bookmarks will be cleared.
property.deleteConfirmWithUsage: Delete the property "{name}"? One bookmark currently has a value for this property — the value will be cleared from that bookmark. | Delete the property "{name}"? {count} bookmarks currently have a value for this property — the value will be cleared from those bookmarks.

trashbin.title: Trashbin
trashbin.confirmPurge: Permanently delete this bookmark? This cannot be undone.
trashbin.confirmPurgeFolder: Permanently delete this folder and all its contents? This cannot be undone.
trashbin.confirmEmpty: Permanently delete all items in the trashbin? This cannot be undone.
trashbin.restoredToRoot: "{name}" was restored to the collection root because its original parent folder is still in the trashbin.

settings.title: Settings
settings.defaultLayoutHint: Used when a collection has no layout of its own. Each collection remembers its own choice once you change it.
settings.offlineCachingHint: Store bookmark data locally for offline browsing.
settings.offlineCachingUpdateError: Failed to update offline caching setting.
settings.savedSearchesHint: Enable the saved searches (smart collections) feature.
settings.savedSearchesUpdateError: Failed to update saved searches setting.

apiKeys.createDescription: Generate a key so CLI tools and scripts can authenticate without browser credentials.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke "{name}" (cl_{prefix}…)? Any tools using this key will immediately lose access.
apiKeys.namePlaceholder: e.g. My Laptop CLI, CI Pipeline
apiKeys.maxReachedHint: You have reached the maximum of 10 active API keys. Revoke an existing key to create a new one.
apiKeys.revealWarning: Copy this key now — you will not be able to see it again.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.

import.title: Import Bookmarks
import.description: Upload a Netscape HTML bookmark file to import into this collection. All folders and bookmarks will be created at the root level.

collectionManage.title: Manage Collections
collectionManage.name: Collection Name
collectionManage.faviconAllowlistHelp: One host pattern per line. Hosts on this list are loaded directly by the browser (e.g. for internal/intranet sites the server can't reach). Use lowercase domains, optionally prefixed with "*." — example: *.mycompany.domain
collectionManage.faviconAllowlistInvalid: Invalid pattern. Use lowercase domains, optionally prefixed with "*.". No schemes, paths, or bare IPs.
collectionManage.screenshotEnabledHelp: Captures a small screenshot of each bookmark's page so a Tiles layout can show visual covers. Off by default — captures are server-side and may take a moment after you save a bookmark.
collectionManage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? All bookmarks, folders, and tags inside will be permanently deleted.
collectionManage.shareDescription: Invite someone to collaborate on this collection by entering their email address.
collectionManage.shareUserNotFound: No user found with that email.
collectionManage.shareSelfError: You cannot share a collection with yourself.
collectionManage.shareNoMembers: Only you have access to this collection.

folder.name: Folder Name
folder.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? All bookmarks inside will be permanently deleted.
folder.dropToRoot: Drop here to move to root level

bookmark.title: Title
bookmark.tagSuggestionError: Failed to apply some tag suggestions.
bookmark.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark? This action cannot be undone.
bookmark.duplicateWarning: A bookmark with this URL already exists:
bookmark.duplicateWarningPlural: {count} bookmarks with this URL already exist:

tag.name: Tag Name
tag.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? The tag will be removed from all bookmarks.

bookmarkList.empty: No bookmarks yet. Click "Add Bookmark" to get started.

search.placeholder: Search bookmarks (use spaces for multiple terms, e.g. prod foobar)...

autocomplete.opUnder: filter by folder and its subfolders

validation.urlScheme: URL must start with http:// or https://
validation.colorHex: Must be a valid hex color (e.g. #ef4444)
validation.atLeastOneTag: At least one tag is required

offline.bannerServer: Can't reach the server. Showing cached data.
offline.bannerNoCache: You're offline. No cached data available.
offline.writeDisabled: This action is not available while offline.

autoTagRule.managerHelp: Define URL patterns that suggest tags when creating bookmarks. Built-in rules for common environment subdomains always run first.
autoTagRule.empty: No custom rules yet. Built-in rules still apply.
autoTagRule.tagNamesHelp: Comma-separated. Tags that don't exist will be created when this rule fires and you accept the suggestion.
autoTagRule.helpSyntax: JavaScript regex syntax. Anchor with ^, escape literal dots as \., use (?:…) for non-capturing groups.

cleanupSuggestions.title: Cleanup Suggestions
cleanupSuggestions.empty: Your collection is tidy! No stale bookmarks found.
cleanupSuggestions.moveToTrashError: Failed to move bookmarks to trash.
cleanupSuggestions.confirmMoveToTrash: Move {count} selected bookmark(s) to the trashbin?

menu.title: Sort · this collection
menu.sharedClicksNote: "Last clicked" and "Click count" reflect everyone in this collection.

batch.moveSubtitle: Choose a destination folder in this collection.
batch.deleteBody: They can be restored from the trashbin. Nothing is permanently deleted.
batch.movedToastRoot: Moved {count} bookmarks to the collection root.
batch.moveError: Failed to move bookmarks. No changes were made.
batch.deleteError: Failed to delete bookmarks. No changes were made.
batch.tagError: Failed to tag bookmarks. No changes were made.
batch.copyError: Failed to copy URLs to clipboard.
